narrative:
Carlisle City D (precinct in Warren County) has 1,158 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.5 percentage points.
